title: Neural network image super-resolution and enhancement

quote.text: To err is human, but to really foul things up you need a computer
quote.author: Paul Ehrlich

links.title: Neural network image super-resolution and enhancement
links.description: Free service to upscale and improve your photos and images using state-of-art neural networks.

links.title: Use SVG as Placeholders, and Other Image Loading Techniques
links.description: An interesting and detailed article that explores different new techniques to create image placeholders.

links.title: React: Forms, Inputs and Events
links.description: This article covers how to capture text input and input via other form elements like <input>, <textarea>, and <option>. Working with them is paramount to web development because they allow our applications to receive data (e.g. text) and actions (e.g. clicks) from users.

links.title: i0natan/nodebestpractices
links.description: An open source list of Node.js best practices list. Curated from the top-ranked articles and very often updated. Definitely, a not-to-be-missed if you are into Node.js or JavaScript.

links.title: Announcing Prometheus 2.0
links.description: An open-source monitoring system with a dimensional data model, flexible query language, efficient time series database and modern alerting approach. It recently reached version 2.0 with some new interesting features.

links.title: ES2017 Async/Await
links.description: A set of interesting Async/Await examples, to really understand how it works and how you can take full advantage of this new ECMAScript feature.

links.title: Write a Vue JS Wrapper Component
links.description: A Vue “wrapper” component is a technique used to integrate a 3rd party plugin with Vue by wrapping it in a custom Vue component. The wrapper technique means that you are likely bringing in a library like jQuery and a jQuery plugin.

book.title: CSS Mastery
book.author: Andy Budd
book.description: Fully updated to the latest CSS modules, make the journey to CSS mastery as simple and painless as possible. This book dives into advanced aspects of CSS-based design, such as responsive design, modular CSS, and CSS typography. Through a series of easy-to-follow tutorials, you will learn practical CSS techniques you can immediately start using in your daily work.
